get.summary: Read a household's active week pointer

200.description: The active week pointer, or null when unset

put.summary: Set a household's active week pointer

delete.summary: Clear a household's active week pointer

204.description: Active week cleared, or already unset

get.summary: List the households the authenticated user belongs to

200.description: Households the authenticated user has an active membership in

post.summary: Ensure the authenticated user has a household, creating "My household" if they have none

200.description: Returned the household the user already belonged to — nothing created

201.description: Created "My household" with the caller as owner

403.description: Caller is not the household owner

404.description: Household not found or caller is not a member
Member not found or caller cannot see this household

409.description: Cannot remove the last owner role

404.description: Member not found or caller cannot see this household

200.description: The household profile, or null when no profile has been saved yet

put.summary: Create or update a household's planning profile

post.summary: Invite someone to join this household

201.description: The created invite, including its shareable token

204.description: Revoked (or already not pending/visible — same observable outcome)

get.summary: Preview an invite before deciding whether to accept it

200.description: The invite is visible to this token holder

404.description: No invite exists for this token

post.summary: Accept an invite, joining its household as a member

200.description: Joined the household (or already a member — idempotent)

404.description: No invite exists for this token

409.description: Invite is no longer acceptable (revoked, expired, or already used by someone else)

post.summary: Generate meals for a week from household profile and available recipes
Append an event to a household week plan

get.summary: Read a household week plan's current state

200.description: The current materialized projection for this week

404.description: The week hasn't started yet — no projection exists

get.summary: Read a household week plan as an iOS-friendly hydrated summary

200.description: The current week plan summary. Missing projections return an empty week.

404.description: Household not found or caller is not a member

get.summary: List a household's persisted week plans

200.description: Week plans ordered by week start date descending

get.summary: Get persisted week-plan history metadata and state

200.description: The persisted week plan, or null when absent

patch.summary: Persist or update week-plan history state

409.description: The supplied expectedUpdatedAt value is stale

post.summary: Append an event to a household shopping list

get.summary: Read a household shopping list's current state

200.description: The current materialized projection for this week

404.description: The list hasn't started yet — no projection exists

get.summary: Read a household shopping list as an iOS-friendly grouped summary

200.description: The current shopping list summary. Missing projections return an empty list.

404.description: Household not found or caller is not a member

get.summary: Read a household shopping list's shared checklist and pantry state

200.description: The shared shopping state, or null when unset

patch.summary: Replace or clear a household shopping list's shared checklist and pantry state

409.description: The supplied expectedUpdatedAt value is stale

patch.summary: Update a recipe (also used to archive via isArchived: true)

404.description: Recipe not found or not in this household

200.description: Public recipes matching the search query

post.summary: Save a readable recipe for the current user

404.description: Recipe not found or not readable by caller

post.summary: Import recipe metadata from a URL

post.summary: Rank candidate meals for a household
